caption: Nova prowls the neon-lit cyberpunk backstreet at dusk, her cybernetic dress fluttering in the rain, as she snaps a photo of the holographic billboard that announces her latest streetwear collection. The scene is shot from a low angle, capturing the wet asphalt, flickering neon signs, and the hum of drones overhead, all bathed in electric blues and magenta hues. ⚡💫 #cyberpunk #futurism #streetfashion #digitalart #neonaesthetics
